news.title: CBSE Portal Was Hit By Malicious Attack, 50 Children Got Into System: Report
news.excerpt: The CBSE has decided to make the re-evaluation portal functional from June 1.

news.title: 20 Answer Sheet Mix-Ups Detected In CBSE's OSM Evaluation System: Report
news.excerpt: Around 20 cases of answer-sheet mismatch were detected during the CBSE Digital Evaluation.

news.title: Domestic PNG Gets Costlier By 50 Paise In Mumbai, CNG Hiked To Rs 86 Per Kg
news.excerpt: CNG prices were last revised on May 14, when the rates were hiked by Rs 2 per kg

news.title: Amit Shah's War On Illegal Constructions Along Border, Villagers Welcome
news.excerpt: Villagers say Shah's move will help check narco-smugglers and other anti-national elements

news.title: "OSM Is The Future": Government Defends CBSE's Digital Evaluation Amid Portal Hacking, Answer Sheet Row
news.excerpt: Govt defends CBSE OSM system after incorrect answer sheet row.

news.title: Kolhapur forms team of 10 transwomen for disaster management and rescue work
news.excerpt: The disaster management cell of the State government has claimed that it is the first such initiative in Maharashtra
